title: Agent/Board Basis Payload
description: Canonical JSON payload structure for agent-issued basis data (facts, sources, weights, reasoning context) consumed by boards and other agents.

schema_version.description: Semantic version string (e.g. '1.0.0'). Consumers MUST reject payloads they do not support.

basis_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this basis instance.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp indicating when the basis was created.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent that produced this basis.

session_id.description: Optional session identifier, typically to correlate basis emissions from the same agent session.

parent_basis_id.description: Optional parent basis identifier. Set when this basis is a refinement or rebuttal of a prior basis.

claims.description: Array of atomic assertions made by the agent.

evidence.description: Evidence items referenced by one or more claims.

evidence_id.description: Unique identifier for the evidence item.

claim_ids.description: List of claim id(s) that this evidence supports.

uri.description: Optional URI or identifier for the original source.

title.description: Optional human-readable title of the evidence.

excerpt.description: Optional excerpt or preview of the evidence content.

retrieved_at.description: Optional timestamp when the evidence was retrieved.

weight.description: Strength of support (float), 0.0 to 1.0, indicating how strongly this evidence supports the linked claim(s).

source_system.description: Name of the upstream system that contributed this evidence.

source_version.description: Optional version identifier of the contributing system or data.

checksum.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum for the evidence item to enable reproducibility.

reasoning_chain.description: Optional ordered reasoning chain from which the claims were derived.

evidence_ids.description: IDs of evidence items used in this step (optional).

claim_ids.description: IDs of claims that result from this step (optional).

inference_type.description: Type of inference used in this step.

uncertainty.description: Top-level summary of uncertainty and caveats about the basis.

overall_confidence.description: Overall confidence across all claims (float), 0.0 to 1.0.

known_unknowns.description: Known unknowns — explicitly unstated or ambiguous aspects.

assumptions.description: Assumptions made in deriving the claims.

contradictions.description: Pairs of claims that are contradictory.

context.description: Operational context in which the basis was produced.

task_id.description: Optional task ID if the basis pertains to a task (e.g., task board ticket).

task_description.description: Optional task description / prompt if the basis pertains to a task.

model_id.description: ID of the model used to generate this basis.

model_version.description: Optional version identifier of the model used.

tool_calls.description: List of tools used during the basis generation process.

input_summary.description: Optional one-line summary of the tool input.

output_summary.description: Optional one-line summary of the tool output.

called_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the tool was called.

extensions.description: Domain-specific or experimental fields without polluting the core schema. Consumers MUST ignore unknown namespaces.
